_template.bible: §1 Casting v2.1 · §2 outfit (if wardrobe ≠ casting plate) · §9.3 blueprint · §10 compose
_template.identity_mapping: Format anchor @Talent-001 → set actor_id to registry handle (example: Aiko-001). Intake emits CONTINUITY LOCK @Aiko-001.
_template.set_style_defaults: Omit to use @Set-Warehouse-Industrial-001 + @Style-Cinematic-001; override only with locked pair from §7–§8
_template.legal_gate: §3.4 — target rating PG-13 default; run legal_gate.py before generation
_template.outfit: §2 step 2b — image_edit character wardrobe from casting plate before video if not story wardrobe on plate

title: [TITLE — short film title]
actor_id: [ActorID — e.g. Aiko-001 from Casting Bible lock card]
